sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 32:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 32:1
items.html: Even though there are only three phases in the light of the line, still, its vessels of reception are only due to phase four. However, phase four itself does not receive light. (Inner Observation, Item 16)
